prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with 3000+ calorie intake at 60% carbs, 20% protein, 20% fat macro ratio

solution_criteria: Meal plan provides approximately 3000+ calories total
Macronutrient distribution matches 60% carbs, 20% protein, 20% fat
Includes meals/snacks strategically timed around training sessions
Plan is compact and presented for a single day
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with specific macro ratios (60% carbs, 20% protein, 20% fat) and timing around training sessions
